Business: Ganga Forging Limited manufactures and sells steel forging parts and machine components for automotive and non-automotive sectors in India. It offers forged crankshafts, crankshaft single and double cylinders, straight and inclined connecting rods, forged and big yokes, trunnion-pins, spiders/crosses, forged trunnion shafts, forged flanges and clam…

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 18.65  (-0.64% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
